label: Dentists

seo.title: Dentist Funding for Equipment, Buildouts, and Growth
seo.description: Funding options for dentists who need equipment, office buildouts, staffing, or expansion capital.

hero.headline: Dentist Funding for Equipment, Buildouts, and Growth
hero.subheadline: Dental practices need capital for chairs, imaging, buildouts, and staffing without slowing down patient flow.

problem: Buildouts take cash before the practice can fully ramp.
Hiring and retention create ongoing capital pressure.
solution: Help dental buyers connect practice economics to the right funding lane so they can grow without feeling boxed into generic business debt.

proof.title: Practice-specific framing
proof.description: The copy aligns with a dentist's capital planning, not a broad small-business template.

proof.title: Clear action
proof.description: A short review step is easier for busy practices than a long application.

proof.title: Growth without jargon
proof.description: The page keeps the promise straightforward and credible.

howItWorks: Share the project: equipment, buildout, or working capital.
Compare speed, structure, and repayment fit.
Book the option that keeps the practice moving.

useCases.title: Equipment purchase
useCases.description: Use it when imaging or chair upgrades need upfront spend.

useCases.title: Office buildout
useCases.description: Use it when expansion requires construction and setup costs.

useCases.title: Staffing runway
useCases.description: Use it when adding hygienists or support staff before revenue catches up.

objections.q: Will this fit a solo practice?
objections.a: Yes. It is useful for solo dentists, group practices, and growth-mode offices.

objections.q: Can I use this for expansion only?
objections.a: Absolutely. It can support buildouts and other capital projects.

objections.q: Is this just another generic loan page?
objections.a: No. It is framed around the realities of a dental practice.

finalCta.label: Book a Dental Review
finalCta.description: Use this page to connect practice growth with the right funding lane.

brief.audience: dentists operators who need working capital, growth capital, or project funding
brief.uniqueValueProposition: Dental practices need capital for chairs, imaging, buildouts, and staffing without slowing down patient flow.
proofPoints: Buildouts take cash before the practice can fully ramp.
